mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zhandianchaxun ORDER BY addtime DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zhandianchaxun (zhandianmingcheng, tupian, daolumingcheng, xiangxidizhi, jingguozhandian, fujinjianzhu, gengxinshijian) VALUES (#{zhandianmingcheng}, #{tupian}, #{daolumingcheng}, #{xiangxidizhi}, #{jingguozhandian}, #{fujinjianzhu}, #{gengxinshijian})
mapper.update: UPDATE zhandianchaxun SET zhandianmingcheng = #{zhandianmingcheng}, tupian = #{tupian}, daolumingcheng = #{daolumingcheng}, xiangxidizhi = #{xiangxidizhi}, jingguozhandian = #{jingguozhandian}, fujinjianzhu = #{fujinjianzhu}, gengxinshijian = #{gengxinshijian} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zhandianchaxun ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
